ValidationRule.description: Only allow certain Type to use Quick Close (Source: I-427256)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $Permission.BD_Bypass_Automation != TRUE ,Quick_Close__c = True ,NOT(ISBLANK( Territory2Id ))
,OR( TEXT(Type)='Demo – New Unit Request ($0-SIOP Planning only)' ,TEXT(Type)='Demo – For Sale to Customer ($$-Not for SIOP planning)' ,TEXT(Type)='Instrument' ,TEXT(Type)='Instrument Upgrade' ,TEXT(Type)='Large Instrument' ,TEXT(Type)='Reagent - Custom Synthesis' ,TEXT(Type)='Software' ,TEXT(Type)='Expand' ,TEXT(Type)='Land' ,TEXT(Type)='Renew' ,TEXT(Type)='New Existing' ,TEXT(Type)='New Products' ,TEXT(Type)='Renewal' ,TEXT(Type)='Renewal - Upsell' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_086: You can not select Quick Close for this Type of Opportunity, Territory and Item Class.. Uncheck Quick Close and save.
